title: Lebanon and Syria join US-led Middle East military talks

snapshot.title: Lebanon and Syria join US-led Middle East military talks
snapshot.description: LONDON: Military leaders from Syria and Lebanon for the first time joined other commanders from across the Middle East at a US defense conference on Wednesday. The regional security dialogue took place in the Bahraini capital, Manama, and was led by US Central Command, which coordinates military operations and cooperation across the Middle East and parts of Asia. The other
snapshot.author: Arab News
